question: When did Caroline go to the LGBTQ support group?
debug_context:
[view_memory_id=301 parent_memory_id=3 memory_view=raw_turn sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_1 dia_id=D1:3 speaker=Caroline] I went to a LGBTQ support group yesterday and it was so powerful.
[view_memory_id=19601 parent_memory_id=196 memory_view=raw_turn sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_10 dia_id=D10:5 speaker=Caroline] Thanks, Melanie! It's awesome to have our own platform to be ourselves and support others' rights. Our group, 'Connected LGBTQ Activists', is made of all kinds of people investing in positive changes. We have regular meetings, plan events and campaigns, to get together and support each other.
[view_memory_id=23401 parent_memory_id=234 memory_view=raw_turn sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_12 dia_id=D12:2 speaker=Melanie] Hey Caroline, sorry about the hike. It sucks when people are so closed-minded. Strong support really helps. FYI, I finished another pottery project - want to see a pic?
[view_memory_id=18401 parent_memory_id=184 memory_view=raw_turn sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_9 dia_id=D9:10 speaker=Caroline] Seeing my mentee's face light up when they saw the support was the best! Such a special moment.
[view_memory_id=23301 parent_memory_id=233 memory_view=raw_turn sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_12 dia_id=D12:1 speaker=Caroline] Hey Mel! How're ya doin'? Recently, I had a not-so-great experience on a hike. I ran into a group of religious conservatives who said something that really upset me. It made me think how much work we still have to do for LGBTQ rights. It's been so helpful to have people around me who accept and support me, so I know I'll be ok!

question: What fields would Caroline be likely to pursue in her educaton?
debug_context:
